by_fixture.purpose: Curated brief-designer session showing scope_creep and vague_participant catches. The host is trying to design a brief to study their own product's onboarding. The conductor catches both failure modes while helping the host get to a focused brief specification.

Curated civic-consultation session showing minimisation_mask and scope_displacement catches. Resident downplays the issue verbally while describing behaviour that reveals real impact, and keeps returning to a topic outside the nominal scope.

Curated civic-consultation session showing trust_contradiction and implied_resignation catches. Resident expresses cynicism about the process while giving unusually detailed input, and describes accommodation in a way that implies they no longer believe change is possible.

Curated founder-product-ideation session showing a contradiction catch across turns about pricing and market size — two claims the founder had not previously reconciled. Also demonstrates an implied_not_said catch about founder-market fit.
Example session — demonstrates meta-noticing, anchor_return, and extraction convergence

Curated founder-product-ideation session where the extraction converges cleanly and the meta-noticing layer correctly returns NO deployed notices. This fixture exists to prove that the platform does not manufacture catches — it returns silent when the material warrants silence. This is a critical counterfactual for judge credibility.

Curated post-incident witness session from a manufacturing near-miss, demonstrating domain-neutrality of the template. Shows an avoidance pattern caught across turns, plus a source-monitoring catch (observed vs post-hoc reconstruction) distinct from the clinical fixture. Includes a welfare-signal the conductor surfaces gently.
Curated post-incident witness session showing cross-turn reasoning in practice.

Curated post-incident witness session from a software production outage, demonstrating the template on a third domain (after clinical and manufacturing). Shows a hedging_pattern catch across turns and an emotional_shift catch at the moment the witness reaches the decision point. A sixth fixture covering SRE/devops use of the incident witness brief.
